homepage.title: Home | Alan Gemmell MP
homepage.meta_description: Learn about Alan Gemmell, the Labour MP for Central Ayrshire, and his latest campaigns, news, and activities in Parliament and at home. Find out how to contact his, get involved and sign up for hisNewsletter.

homepage.text_excerpt: --> Home | Alan Gemmell MP top of page Menu Close Home How can I help? About Me Contact Me Surgeries Visit Parliament Newsletter Home How can I help? About Me Contact Me Surgeries Visit Parliament Newsletter Alan Gemmell MP Delivering for our Towns and Villages GET IN TOUCH Money won for residents 34990 £ Constituents helped 5384 Local surgeries held 96 Proud to serve Central Ayrshire. I was born and brought up in Girdle Toll and Irvine, and I am proud to call Central Ayrshire my home. Before entering Parliament, I served the UK overseas, representing our country around the world in public service. I am deeply grateful to the voters of Central Ayrshire for placing their trust in me. While representing Britain internationally was a great privilege, representing the families and communities of Central Ayrshire is the greatest honour of my life. Working for you Letter to South Ayrshire Council over Diving Club cuts Photo: Ayr Diving Club On Monday, along with Elaine Stewart MP, I wrote to the Chief Executive of South Ayrshire Council over concerns about cuts in their budget that could lead to the phasing out of Ayr Diving Club. Members, and parents of members, of Ayr Diving Club have written to use concerned that cuts in the South Ayrshire Council budget could lead to the phasing out of the club. As you may know, the club operated our of the Citadel leisure centre. The pool at the Citad Apr 1 1 min read Campaign win for safer streets in Campaign success! I’m delighted to have secured a reduction in the speed limit on the B743 from 60 to 40 miles per hour - ending a decade-long campaign by residents. After I held a public meeting on the issue earlier this year, I worked with Sergeant Slaven to ensure road safety measures were introduced. This change will make this road safer for everyone who uses it. I met with residents in St Quivox earlier today to celebrate! Aug 12, 2025 1 min read Tell the SNP to stop the cuts to our crossing patrols I've been campaigning with Girdle Toll parents to stop the SNP administration at North Ayrshire Council from cutting June and 15 other crossing patrols. Please join almost 1000 people who have signed their petition online or at the local shops. https://www.change.org/.../keep-our-kids-safe-save-june ... June's been keeping Girdle Toll children safe for 25 years - and we want her to stay. Aug 12, 2025 1 min read 1 2 3 4 5 Dreghorn Irvine Troon The Villages The Coalfields Prestwick Click on this map for news about your area Boydston GET IN TOUCH Contact me First name * Last name * Address * Email * Phone Message * Yes, subscribe me to your newsletter. Submit WORKING HARD FOR OUR AREA My campaigns Research and Development Irvine is in running to become UK's AI Growth Zone B743 Road safety measures along the B743 outside St Quivox Improving postal services Getting post to Troon British coal superannuation scheme Giving back to the mining community what it is owed Ambitious Ayrshire Backing our most successful sectors and investing in Ayrshire MORE OF ALAN'S CAMPAIGNS Promoted by Annabel Ainsworth on behalf of Alan Gemmell MP, both at Suite 5, Sovereign House, Irvine, KA12 8RL Delivering for our towns and villages ​ Privacy Policy © 2026 Alan Gemmell Home How can I help? pages.title: About Me | Alan Gemmell MP
headings: h2: Delivering for our towns and villages
pages.text_excerpt: --> About Me | Alan Gemmell MP top of page Menu Close Home How can I help? About Me Contact Me Surgeries Visit Parliament Newsletter Home How can I help? About Me Contact Me Surgeries Visit Parliament Newsletter About Me I was born and brought up here, my family live here and I live in the constituency too. I did my public service overseas. It’s the privilege of my life to represent the people of Central Ayrshire in Parliament. ​ As British Trade Commissioner I led a team of over 200 people that delivered £4.5 billion of trade and investment deals for the UK and secured over 18,000 new jobs. ​ With the Scottish Whisky Association, I secured a major reduction in whisky tarrifs in India - resulting in more bottles sold and safeguarding jobs back here in Scotland. I’ve been at the forefront of the UK’s shift to winning new green jobs. I negotiated directly with Tata, the top Indian investor in the UK, to win their £4 billion electric vehicle battery factory - and 5000 well paying jobs - for Britain. ​ I was born and brought up here. ​ Coming from an ordinary working family in Irvine, thanks to great teachers, support from the council and the 1997 Labour Government, I’ve had extraordinary opportunities. Like many people in our community, my dad lost his job in the 80s. He then became a council bin-man. My mum started working in factories and ended up joining a local charity advocating for people with mental health issues. Now she has early-onset dementia. Although I have lived in India for the past few years, Ayrshire has always been home. ​ Contact Promoted by Annabel Ainsworth on behalf of Alan Gemmell MP, both at Suite 5, Sovereign House, Irvine, KA12 8RL Delivering for our towns and villages ​ Privacy Policy © 2026 Alan Gemmell Home How can I help? About Me Contact Me Surgeries Visit Parliament Newsletter bottom of page

pages.text_excerpt: --> Contact Me | Alan Gemmell MP top of page Menu Close Home How can I help? About Me Contact Me Surgeries Visit Parliament Newsletter Home How can I help? About Me Contact Me Surgeries Visit Parliament Newsletter ALAN'S WORK Contact Me Please note that due to strict Parliamentary protocol, I am only able to make enquiries on behalf of my own constituents. To check if you live in my constituency, check your MP here ​ In addition, I do not accept enquiries from constituents via social media platforms, all cases should be sent to be through email, telephone, post, or one of the forms on this site. ​ For the safety of my team, I am currently unable to allow constituents to drop-in to my constituency office, this address may only be used for postal enquiries. Should you wish you speak to me in person reach out and I will do my best to arrange a surgery appointment. Contact me First name * Last name * Address * Email * Phone Message * Yes, subscribe me to your newsletter. Submit Inviting me to an event? I welcome the change to visit local groups, organisations, businesses, and schools in Central Ayrshire. If you are inviting me to a meeting or event click the button below and fill out a quick form. Invite Me to an Event Promoted by Annabel Ainsworth on behalf of Alan Gemmell MP, both at Suite 5, Sovereign House, Irvine, KA12 8RL Delivering for our towns and villages ​ Privacy Policy © 2026 Alan Gemmell Home How can I help? pages.text_excerpt: --> Surgeries | Alan Gemmell MP top of page Menu Close Home How can I help? About Me Contact Me Surgeries Visit Parliament Newsletter Home How can I help? About Me Contact Me Surgeries Visit Parliament Newsletter ALAN'S WORK Surgeries Please note that due to strict Parliamentary protocol, I am only able to make enquiries on behalf of my own constituents. To check if you live in my constituency, check your MP here ​ In addition, I do not accept enquiries from constituents via social media platforms, all cases should be sent to be through email, telephone, post, or one of the forms on this site. I hold regular in person and online surgeries where we can discuss issues where you'd like my help. These usually take place on Thursday's and Friday's when I am back in Ayrshire, but appointments are available at other times if needed. Email me to book your appointment My team of caseworkers are happy to help you with any personal casework or enquiries. Due to strict parliamentary protocol, I am only able to make representations for those who live in Central Ayrshire. You can check who your local MP is by clicking below and entering your postcode. Who is my MP?
